task_name: Add Live Builder Adapter Readiness Missing Fields and CLI Error Tests
goal: Add local missing-required-fields and CLI error tests for Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate without changing runtime behavior or enabling live Builder, auth, secrets, persistence, task creation, or execution.
claims: BP-078 adds a missing-required-fields fixture for Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate.
BP-078 adds local CLI error tests for missing input and unreadable input.
BP-078 does not change Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate runtime behavior.
assumptions: BP-077 requires missing-required-fields and CLI error hardening before any live-adapter work.
The existing candidate already maps incomplete JSON to a blocked output.
CLI errors should remain local process-level errors and should not contact external systems.
dod: Missing-required-fields fixture exists and is checked by tools/test-live-builder-adapter-readiness-candidate-fixtures.cjs.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, Builder Task Create, auth, secrets, persistence, approval recording, DB, deploy, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-077 named missing-required-fields and CLI error tests as mandatory local pre-live hardening.
